Mr. Syed Pasha Osman Sahib Patel, Chairman, State Commission for Agricultural Prices, Mumbai was appointed as the Chairman of the Department.
The Ministerial status is conferred by the Government Decision in Reference No. 1 and in Reference No. 2.
Under the memorandum, the government has approved the provision of government facilities.
Shri Pasha Patel, Chairman (Ministerial Status), State Commission for Agricultural Prices under the Maharashtra Ministers' Allowances Rules, 1956.
According to the Maharashtra Minister's Allowances Rules, 1956, the honorarium paid for a minister's post has been made permissible.
According to this, the salary paid for the post of minister is fixed as the basic salary and dearness allowance and other allowances of the chief secretary.
